business_description.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania.

coverages_discussed.current_limit: Employers Liability: $1,000,000 each accident; $1,000,000 disease policy; $1,000,000 disease each employee
coverages_discussed.notes: Policy number WC-KCB-2025-5580. Form WC 00 00 04. Classification schedule includes carpentry, electrical wiring, plumbing, masonry, interior painting, contractors/project managers/superintendents, and clerical office employees. Endorsements listed include Waiver of Our Right to Recover From Others, Alternate Employer, All States, and Terrorism Risk Insurance Act endorsements.

document_info.document_type: Workers Compensation and Employers Liability Insurance Policy

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: SIC Code: 1521. Description: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania.

concerns: Construction operations include higher-hazard classes such as carpentry, electrical wiring, plumbing, masonry, and painting.
positives: Employers Liability limits shown as $1,000,000 each accident, $1,000,000 disease policy, and $1,000,000 disease each employee.
